# Project Summary
This project is part of the Bluefly.io/OSSA decentralized agent ecosystem.

# Discovery & Agentic Coordination (DUADP)
- **Protocol**: DUADP (Decentralized Universal AI Discovery Protocol)
- **Metadata**: See `ai.json` for agent permissions, licensing, capability tags, and trust endpoints.
- **Directives**: See `AGENTS.md` for build/test guides and architectural rules.
- **Connectivity**: See `mcp.json` or `.mcp.json` for tool definitions.

## Branch Policy
- Local default: release/v*.x (never main)
- Feature branches created from release/v*.x
- main is read-only for local development
- Only release/v*.x merges into main
- If local main exists: stop, backup, move work to release/v*.x, delete main
